name: SAS Model Manager
description: Enterprise model lifecycle governance platform that manages models from development through production to retirement, providing regulatory audit trails, automated documentation, and continuous performance monitoring.
elevatorPitch: Complete model lifecycle governance — from development to production to retirement, with regulatory audit trails.
capabilities: Centralized model registry with risk tiering and metadata
Automated model drift detection with alerting
Auto-generated model documentation and model cards
Configurable approval workflows with audit trail
Bias and fairness detection across protected classes
Integration with CI/CD pipelines for MLOps
targetBuyer: Head of Model Risk, Chief Data Officer, Head of Data Science
phUseCases: BSP Circular 1112 model risk management compliance
Model inventory for BSP examination readiness
Automated model documentation for regulatory submission
Credit scoring model governance for universal banks
